acceptance_targets: [chapter_08_prose_001_negation_reversal_tic] PASS if no more than one of the cited beats still uses an explicit negation-reversal construction and the revised moments remain clear without repeating the same sentence shape; FAIL if readers still encounter this scaffold three or more times across the chapter.

[chapter_08_prose_002_accounting_motif_overexplicit] PASS if the revised chapter retains the counting motif but uses no more than two explicit bookkeeping labels after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:225, and at least one of Elise's late turning beats lands through material detail rather than finance/accounting vocabulary; FAIL if the back half still spells out the same metaphor in multiple adjacent beats.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than one of the cited beats still uses an explicit negation-reversal construction and the revised moments remain clear without repeating the same sentence shape; FAIL if readers still encounter this scaffold three or more times across the chapter.
findings.problem: The chapter uses the same negation-and-correction scaffold at multiple pressure points: 'It was not ...,' 'It was the opposite ...,' 'It was not sentiment. It was strategy ...' Once, this is sharp; four times, it reads like a reusable sentence machine rather than fresh perception.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least three of the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:125, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:237, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:273 so they land through different syntax, image, or action instead of another 'not X / actually Y' reversal.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter retains the counting motif but uses no more than two explicit bookkeeping labels after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:225, and at least one of Elise's late turning beats lands through material detail rather than finance/accounting vocabulary; FAIL if the back half still spells out the same metaphor in multiple adjacent beats.
findings.problem: The opening counting motif is earned, but the back half keeps naming the same idea outright through 'counting,' 'arithmetic,' 'account book,' and 'ledger.' Because the chapter already has coins, rows, hems, and ration math doing this work, the repeated bookkeeping labels flatten subtext into self-commentary.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the initial counting frame at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:95, then thin or concretize the later echoes at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:225, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:243, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:245, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:269, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:321. Let bodily drag, stitched cloth, hunger, and route risk carry the motif instead of repeatedly naming bookkeeping logic.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
